title: Lafia Heat Wave
lead: Lafia is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.91. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Lafia has resulted in a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with a value of 16.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 43% and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) with a value of 0.0 GG further emphasizes the extreme heat conditions.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
